caption: A man with a tall, grey, stylized wig, glasses, and headphones is seated in a podcast studio. He wears a white button-down shirt with a red bow tie and tan suspenders. A professional black microphone is positioned in front of him. The background consists of a wall decorated with various framed photographs and clothing items on mannequins, including a white shirt labeled "LEE." Two logos appear on the screen: a circular logo on the left containing the text "PODCAST" and "TALK," and a red text logo on the right that reads "GOSS TALK JOY." Across the sequence, the man remains seated and mostly still, slightly shifting his gaze and adjusting his facial expression while looking toward someone off-camera to his right. The camera angle and lighting remain constant throughout the scene.
